<!-- PR title must follow Conventional Commits, e.g. "feat: add zed installer" -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `refactor` / `chore` — no behavior change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] registry — adds/updates a `registry.json` item

## How tested

<!-- e.g. `make check` (lint + typecheck + test), manual TUI run, etc. -->

- [ ] `make check` passes

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed (README / CONTRIBUTING / CLAUDE.md)
- [ ] No unrelated changes
